underlying_goal: Fix a scheduler datetime crash in a Dockerized Flask app, including .dockerignore, error handling improvements, and tests
friction_detail: The initial fix didn't properly handle Docker bind-mount behavior, causing watches.json to be created as a directory, requiring a second debugging round.
brief_summary: User wanted to fix a scheduler datetime crash in Docker; initial changes were implemented but caused a secondary Docker bind-mount issue that was being debugged when the session ended.
